name: chunk-large
title: Local Chroma + ONNX MiniLM, ~2000-character chunks
description: Same embedder as baseline, coarse sections. At 2000 characters this is genuinely the largest of the three, so the trio now brackets the shipped default from both sides: 300 / 1200 / 2000. Note that on a body whose longest section is under 1200 characters this profile is indistinguishable from baseline — a budget only bites when a section exceeds it.
